prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.6 kg; Height 169.8 cm; BMI 23.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 137/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 180mg/dL; 9 months ago 197mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 209mg/dL; current 176mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.1kg; 9 months ago 65.3kg; 6 months ago 64.9kg; 3 months ago 64.8kg; current 68.6kg), Height (12 months ago 169.8cm; 9 months ago 169.8cm; 6 months ago 169.8cm; 3 months ago 169.8cm; current 169.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 138mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 137mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 52U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 50U/L), AST (12 months ago 100U/L; 9 months ago 97U/L; 6 months ago 83U/L; 3 months ago 88U/L; current 95U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 474mg/g; 9 months ago 639mg/g; 6 months ago 696mg/g; 3 months ago 573mg/g; current 734mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 127mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
